response.original_title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。
response.overview: I had always harbored a sexual urge to see my wife cheat on me... But I couldn't continue our married life with this feeling. So I confessed it to her. Sumire was bewildered by my confession of such an abnormal sexual fetish, but she was so devoted that she offered herself up for me. My wife being violated deep in her throat and vagina, surrounded by middle-aged men... It was like she was being "impaled," and I felt the greatest excitement of my life. Sumire had an ecstatic expression on her face that she never showed me.
response.title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。
